text:
NEON GENESIS EVANGELION MUSIC remix is a DVD (Catalog number KIBA-91300) created by GAINAX and published by King Records via its label STARCHILD on 23 August 2006. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gB4001801/ It is collected remixes made by DJs from all over the world who were greatly influenced by Evangelion. https://web.archive.org/web/20070827035558/http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=1223 It was sold for ¥2800 and inside the double pack alongside the NEON GENESIS EVANGELION MUSIC DVD on 12 August 2006 for ¥5000 (tax included) https://web.archive.org/web/20060804055722/http://evangelion.co.jp:80/ .

Tracklist

Bonus: UNU Another Track (three separate video tracks [left, right, center] and one integrated panoramic video track for “The One”) http://svenge.evamonkey.com/evasite/jpmusic/KIBA1300.htm
